name: Endura
description: The delicate form of this Tenno rapier conceals its ferocious and resilient force.

patchlogs.name: Lua’s Prey: Hotfix 32.2.2
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Lua Thrax enemies spawning in the Endurance Drift test and getting stuck in the room.

patchlogs.name: Gara Prime: Update 30.3.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Endurance Drift not actually increasing your Warframe parkour velocity.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.10.0: Corpus Proxima & The New Railjack
patchlogs.changes: Each Crew for Hire will have their own set of competencies: Piloting, Gunnery, Repair, Combat, and Endurance.

patchlogs.name: Orphix Venom: Hotfix 29.6.4
patchlogs.changes: Fixed proper AABC reward not being given when achieving the Endurance max 36th Orphix.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.6.0: Orphix Venom!
patchlogs.fixes:
Endurance
Each Orphix has an initial value of 100 points in the first Operation mission. As your fight evolves, so will the Orphix, awarding you more points at a greater difficulty. Orphix will be worth 200 points at the hardest difficulty (Endurance), and scale up from there! Kill Sentients to increase your score as well. The higher your score, the more Phasic Cells you’ll walk away with. Try to survive for as long as you can 
36 Orphix will be the maximum amount in the Endurance mission, so once you’ve hit 36, it’s time to extract! The first two Operation missions have a limit of 24 Orphix. Players looking to maximize their score should head to Endurance! .
Endurance gives the most points per Orphix, so you’ll earn the most Phasic Cells there. A prepared and coordinated squad even more so! While this Operation is possible Solo, best results will come from coordinated Squads!

patchlogs.name: Scarlet Spear: 27.3.16
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when encountering the Halls of Ascension Endurance Test.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.0.5
patchlogs.changes: Operation: Hostile Mergers Endurance score stat is now displayed in the Player/Clan Profile > Stats.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when completing a Round in The Index Endurance.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Hotfix 20.6.1
patchlogs.changes: Tweaked the Endura Idle FX to better display ‘leafy particles’.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Update 20.6.0 + 20.6.0.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Removed the Mastery Rank requirement from the Endura Collection
Changed the Endura to be Mastery Rank 7 required instead of 8.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20
patchlogs.changes: All of the Index mission options available on The Index node on Neptune have been removed, except for the Endurance mode. This node is optional, and is not required to complete Neptune. Since Endurance modes play out with no explicit end, we've made all Index enemies drop all Index exclusive modes so that you can remain in the same Endurance mission without missing out on drops that the enemies don't spawn.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.9.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed not losing wagered Credits when losing a match in The Index Endurance.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.5.1 + 19.5.2
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed a script error in the Index Endurance mode caused on host migration
Fixed Endurance Mode timer breaking on host migration

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview: Hotfix #4
patchlogs.changes: Fixed The Index Endurance mode scaling to be based off of enemy deaths, not player-scored Index points.
